tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file in the repository.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List the contents of a directory in the repository.

tools.name: search_repo
tools.description: Search the repository for files or symbols matching a query.

tools.name: show_diff
tools.description: Show the diff for a pending or staged change.

tools.name: propose_patch
tools.description: Propose a patch for review; requires review queue entry before application.

tools.name: run_validation
tools.description: Run a local validation command (make check, make quick); requires explicit approval.
